title: Iron's Magic
description:
A lightweight Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks modpack with 
a little optimization, better grass, dynamic lights, and shaders.
body:
Small lightweight modpack, only featuring Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks and the best of optifine (as far as we know): optimization (Sodium, Lithium, etc), connected grass (Fast Better Grass), dynamic lighting (Dynamic Lights), and shader support (Iris). Made for low-end systems or for people who only want to play with magic. Already has a selection of the most popular shaders preinstalled.
Disclaimers:
• This project is in no way affiliated with Iron431, we just love this mod and wanted to make a nice modpack for it.
• This modpack adds no other functionality other than Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks.
